headline.text: L3 Cavanna wrapper down since 06:55 — maintenance escalated to Chris Givens, *15 minutes out* as of window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 3 electrical connection blew and melted on the front end Z conveyor during morning clean — maintenance working through it. Sollich 2 setting up a first-time product run with guide rails and box print configuration still in progress at window close.
per_plant_summary.L2: No issues. FFS line started at 06:08, batch verified, product meeting spec on piece count and appearance. ML3 depositing normally, all quality checks passing.
per_plant_summary.L3: Cavanna wrapper on ML1 down since 06:55, won't start — maintenance on-site, Chris Givens called in. MF Matrix had two quick hits (low air pressure alarm, then feeding conveyors) but both cleared inside 10 minutes. Demolding belt damage flagged for follow-up. High-speed roll-up door won't shut off properly despite setpoint adjustments.

notes.text: Third-shift pallet left without IMS label; Preston Tregaskis flagged for shift report follow-up to reinforce labeling discipline.
Nathan Ruiz swapped out Cavanna infeed belt at 06:01 (separate from the later Cavanna down event).

resolved.title: MF Matrix low air pressure alarm blocked startup
resolved.summary: Machine threw low air pressure alarm and would not turn on; maintenance called and cleared it quickly.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:26 — "Got it running now" (Nathan Ruiz).

resolved.title: MF Matrix feeding conveyors stopped moving
resolved.summary: Some feeding conveyors on MF Matrix stopped moving, bringing the machine down; Nathan Ruiz on-site troubleshooting.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 3 electrical connection blew and melted on Z conveyor
needs_attention.summary: Electrical connection on front end Z conveyor blew and melted; maintenance working on repair during morning clean.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance working on the issue as of 05:51; no update on completion by window close.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 first-time product run setup incomplete
needs_attention.summary: Pack area setup for first-time product run missing guide rails and needs box print configuration before line can start.
needs_attention.status: Temper, bed load, and caramel ready as of 06:49; awaiting guide rails and box print setup to start line.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Cavanna wrapper won't start
needs_attention.summary: Cavanna machine on Molding Line 1 won't start; maintenance on-site, escalated to Chris Givens who was 15 minutes out at window close.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance troubleshooting; Chris Givens called and 15 minutes out as of 07:15.

needs_attention.title: ML1 demolding belt damaged with curled pieces
needs_attention.summary: Demolding belt showing damage with curled pieces; flagged for Monday first-shift maintenance check, but Chris Givens being asked to look at it during Cavanna visit.
needs_attention.status: Chris Givens being asked to inspect during Cavanna call as of 07:01; originally scheduled for Monday maintenance.

needs_attention.title: High-speed roll-up door won't shut off when closed
needs_attention.summary: High-speed roll-up door appears to stay energized when closed; door stop setpoint adjustments in manual mode not resolving, keeps closing to -3%.
needs_attention.status: Nathan Ruiz tried changing door stop setpoint with no effect as of 06:12; still closing to -3% in manual mode.
